# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for our Python web application. Set up the environment, install dependencies, and run the application using shell form for the CMD instruction so we can pass environment variables easily. Example CMD python app.py $PORT

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

FROM python:3.9-slim-buster

# Set the working directory to /app
WORKDIR /app

# Copy the requirements file
COPY requirements.txt .

# Install the dependencies
RUN pip install -r requirements.txt

# Copy the application code
COPY . .

# Expose the port that our application will listen on
EXPOSE 8000

# Run the application using shell form for the CMD instruction so we can pass environment variables easily
CMD ["python", "app.py", "$PORT"]
